chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Age at Which Children Are Required to Observe Fasting

parts.text: 1904 - وَ رَوَى عَنْهُ إِسْمَاعِيلُ بْنُ مُسْلِمٍ أَنَّهُ قَالَ

text: : «إِذَا أَطَاقَ اَلْغُلاَمُ صَوْمَ ثَلاَثَةِ أَيَّامٍ مُتَتَابِعَةٍ فَقَدْ وَجَبَ عَلَيْهِ صِيَامُ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1904 - It is narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) through Isma'il ibn Muslim that He said:
"If a boy is able to fast for three consecutive days, fasting the Month of Ramadan becomes obligatory upon him."
